overall.description: A first-person boat journey through a narrow rocky canyon with turquoise water in a high-quality game engine environment. The scene features stormy overcast weather with a sudden lightning flash and includes a distant metal bridge and tropical palm trees visible through the mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow misty canyon with turquoise river

agents.ego_description: piloting a boat through the narrow waterway between steep rock walls

steep dark rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon
metal truss bridge spanning the canyon in the distance
tropical palm trees visible near the bridge structure
lush green plants growing on the left riverbank rocks

segments.scene_description: The camera moves steadily forward through a narrow canyon with steep rocky walls on both sides. Turquoise water flows beneath the boat as it approaches a distant metal bridge and palm trees visible through the misty, overcast atmosphere.

events.description: sudden bright lightning flash illuminates the entire canyon briefly

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the boat toward the bridge after the lightning strike

segments.scene_description: A bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the canyon as the boat continues forward. The metal bridge and palm trees become more prominent in the frame while the foreground vegetation on the left recedes from view, with the camera steadily approaching the distant structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey through a narrow rocky canyon that gradually reveals a distant industrial structure amidst a stormy atmosphere. It begins with the camera gliding over turquoise water between steep cliffs, moving toward a metal bridge and palm trees partially obscured by a misty, overcast haze. As the boat advances, a sudden, bright flash of lightning illuminates the canyon walls and the surrounding environment. The scene then shifts as the foreground vegetation on the left recedes, allowing the distant bridge and tropical greenery to become more prominent in the frame. The camera continues its steady approach, closing the gap between the rocky corridor and the looming structure ahead.
